phrases.intent_en: Is the domestic flights hall this way?
phrases.text_local: İç hatlar terminali bu tarafta mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Asking for directional confirmation is common, but staff will refer to the information desk if unsure of a passenger's exact position.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, domestic flights are this way.

responses.english: Yes, domestic flights are this way.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the visa desk for arrivals?
phrases.text_local: Gelen yolcular için vize masası nerede?
phrases.cultural_note: Without a stable target for the exact desk location, defaulting to the safety prefix is appropriate.

likely_response.translation_en: On the right, next to passport control.

responses.english: On the right, next to passport control.

phrases.intent_en: When does the last airport bus leave?
phrases.text_local: Son havalimanı otobüsü ne zaman kalkıyor?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus schedules are subject to change; staff avoid giving exact times and refer to official information points.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the visa desk for arrivals?
phrases.cultural_note: When exact location is unknown, staff default to directing passengers to the main information point.

likely_response.translation_en: On the left side of the arrivals hall.

responses.english: On the left side of the arrivals hall.

phrases.intent_en: Do I remove my belt at security?
phrases.cultural_note: In Turkey, security staff are typically direct and brief when giving instructions.
